coverage: All five authored input sweeps execute with exact vertex and face counts and local bounds within 0.0001 units of Blender.
validation: Split Edges processes mesh components inside instances, matching Blender autosmooth topology. Curve Tangent now consumes Resample Curve's evaluated normalized-segment-bisector frame instead of rebuilding a length-weighted chord; the 39 pre-twist instance transforms match Blender within 0.000086 units.

groups.surface: roughness 2/15 mace ball and zero-roughness polished chain

materialParity.evidence: The exact soup contains an 18,620-triangle chrome.002 range and a 206,528-triangle null range. Blender's realized mesh has slots [chrome.002, null], assigns all 214,718 faces to slot zero, and carries rough=2 on the 9,310 mace faces while the joined chain resolves it to zero. The authored Mapping output drives Noise Scale while Noise Vector stays zero, so Blender produces a constant mapped value of 1/15 rather than spatial grain; the browser reproduces roughness 2/15 on the mace and zero on the chain. The authored capture decodes Blender's exact CC0 studio.exr (SHA-256 c36c7fd390b2cdf8693360cf3662cb1d710c95fa799d9f822f42997167839b56), uses 0.8 environment strength and a measured PI longitude correction, and retains the deterministic RectArea rig. Pixel correlation improves from -0.0670 to 0.2424, macro correlation from -0.2582 to 0.2296, pixel MAE from 0.2069 to 0.1985, macro MAE from 0.1823 to 0.1066, and mean luminance delta from -0.1840 to -0.0146. This luminance gain trades against mask IoU (0.9406 to 0.9369) and binary disagreement (0.0897 to 0.1485), which remain sensitive to Eevee versus Three.js rasterization.
